sprint: Sprint 2 — Enterprise Demo (Day 2 Final Stability Confirmation)
scoring_model: v16 (6-factor: core_pillars 35%, sprint_alignment 20%, test_coverage 15%, ui_readiness 15%, agent_health 10%, infrastructure 5%)

core_pillars.detail: V3=4,063 core LOC (brain_pipeline 1533 + autofix 1428 + fail_engine 711 + llm_consensus 391), V5=5,363 LOC (micro_pentest 2054 + mpte_advanced 1089 + mpte_router 1084 + sandbox_verifier 1136), V7=1,446 LOC (mcp_server 978 + mcp_router 468). Grand total 10,872 core pillar LOC. All engines LIVE returning 200. Verified via wc -l.

sprint_alignment.detail: 11/12 DEMO items done (91.7%). Only DEMO-003 (UI wiring) remains — 6 pages with mock data, 90% complete. All P0 blockers resolved. DEMO-001 (backend-hardener: E2E 58/58, 769 routes). DEMO-002 (qa-engineer: Newman 475/475, 8th consecutive green).

test_coverage.detail: 19.25% pytest coverage (target 25%, gap 5.75pp). 13,221 tests collected (verified via pytest --co, 13.81s). Newman best: 475/475 = 100%. Latest swarm: 468/475 = 98.5% (7 failures in Discover/Remediate/PersonaWorkflows). Moat coverage 88.95%. Gate FAILING.

ui_readiness.detail: suite-ui/aldeci: 37,088 LOC, 62 pages, 25 components. 0 TS errors. Bundle 193KB. DEMO-003 90% — 6 pages remain with mock data (AttackLab, Copilot, DataFabric, IntelligenceHub, RemediationCenter, Settings). CodeScanning, Integrations, IntegrationsSettings wired to real APIs.

agent_health.detail: 14/17 agents completed Day 2 runs. 2 still running (context-engineer, agent-doctor — late swarm). 1 in-progress (frontend-craftsman for DEMO-003). Health GREEN per agent-doctor run32. 19/19 engines intact (20,783 LOC). All 17 Grade A.

infrastructure.detail: Docker compose validated (9/10 files). Air-gapped test complete with all 8 scanners. Demo healthcheck 34/34. CI pipeline comprehensive. Enterprise compose context fix applied.

V1.work_today: Maintained — APP_ID model intact across all scanners and brain pipeline

V2.work_today: Maintained — 10-phase lifecycle intact in brain_pipeline.py (1,533 LOC)

V3.work_today: backend-hardener: 769 routes, 58/58 E2E, 11 security fixes. data-scientist: SHAP→brain pipeline (+326 LOC). KG demo data seeded (73 nodes, 110 edges). enterprise-architect: SQLite connection leak fix.

V4.work_today: No active work (correctly deferred per debate verdict)

V5.work_today: threat-architect: 2 new demo scripts (ctem-investor-demo.sh 24/24, mpte-sandbox-demo.sh 12/12). MPTE+Sandbox PoC integration verified. CTEM full loop with signed evidence.

V6.work_today: No active work (correctly deferred per debate verdict — ship when NIST mandates 2028-2030)

V7.work_today: MCP demo stable: 705 tools discovered, JSON-RPC verified. 22 tests pass.

V8.work_today: Demo-only scope (correctly bounded). 5 feedback loops, 18 endpoints, 73 tests, score delta verified.

V9.work_today: devops-engineer: Air-gapped test all 8 scanners. healthcheck v2.2.0. CI improvements (7 enhancements).

V10.work_today: qa-engineer: Newman 475/475 = 100% (8th consecutive green). Evidence export: RSA-SHA256 signed bundles verified. 322 deep tests added. Moat 88.95%.

drift_analysis.note: Zero vision drift. All 17 agents operated within sprint scope and pillar boundaries on Day 2. frontend-craftsman was watchdog-killed but prior work preserved (0 TS errors). enterprise-architect did reliability review (V3-adjacent tech debt — appropriate secondary objective).

active_debates.topic: Real API keys committed in .env file
active_debates.note: Infrastructure mitigated (.gitignore updated). CEO must rotate OpenAI API key + JWT secret.

recommendations.note: This is the ONLY remaining blocker. The moderator verdict identified UI as existential risk. 4 days to demo.

recommendations.recommendation: SEC-ADV-001 key rotation — CEO must rotate OpenAI API key + JWT secret
recommendations.note: Open 1 day. Infrastructure mitigated but keys still need rotation.

recommendations.recommendation: Test coverage gap: 19.25% vs 25% gate (5.75pp). DEMO-006 config applied but coverage still below gate. Do NOT write more tests — fix measured paths.
recommendations.note: Per coordination-notes directive: do NOT write Python unit tests. Fix pyproject.toml coverage config.

recommendations.recommendation: Newman 7 failures in latest swarm (468/475 = 98.5%). Investigate and fix: Discover (3), Remediate (2), PersonaWorkflows (2).

Ensure frontend-craftsman runs Day 3 to complete DEMO-003 (last blocker, 6 pages)
